entry.title: 8-K: Apple Inc. files current report regarding government contract award
entry.summary: Apple Inc. filed a Form 8-K reporting a material definitive agreement with a federal agency for the supply of custom semiconductor components valued at over $500 million.

entry.title: 8-K: Raytheon Technologies discloses government contract termination
entry.summary: Raytheon Technologies Corporation filed a Form 8-K disclosing the termination of a material government defense contract worth approximately $1.2 billion due to budget reallocation.

entry.title: 8-K: Tesla Inc. reports change in board composition
entry.summary: Tesla Inc. filed a Form 8-K regarding a change in board composition under Item 5.02. No government-related matters were disclosed.
